verdict: One agent whose only objective is to survive composes a grid position sense, an uncertainty read-out, landmark relocalisation and interoceptive drives into a coherent animal: an N-organ lesion dissociation shows all four are load-bearing (each ablation fails in its own way), and an emergent super-additive interaction shows the uncertainty organ is worthless without the landmark organ — the parts form circuits, not a pile. Nothing about which resource or when to relocalise is hardcoded; it emerges from staying alive.
